post.description: Exchange username + password for an access + refresh token pair.
Mint a fresh access token from a still-valid refresh token.

get.description: Family-wide net-worth-over-time, aggregated across the family's investors.
Current holdings + valuation as a downloadable CSV (free tier).
Full transaction ledger as a CSV in the import format (round-trippable).

post.description:
Import any CAS PDF — a CAMS/KFin MF CAS or an NSDL/CDSL eCAS.

The type is auto-detected: an MF CAS becomes a transaction ledger; an eCAS is
the depository's authoritative snapshot (refreshes holdings). If applying an
eCAS would *remove* securities, the job returns status ``needs_confirmation``
with ``result.removals`` and persists nothing — resubmit with ``confirm=true``
to apply. An eCAS older than the latest on file is rejected.

get.description:
Roster headline numbers: current INR value, tax-ready vs total holdings,
items needing attention, and the last successful import date.

post.description: Manually add one transaction (security identified inline, upserted).

get.description:
Net-worth-over-time, reconstructed from the ledger + NAV history. The final
point matches the point-in-time ``/summary`` value for the same ``to`` date.
